Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Forn Interrogatories And Request For Production, With Proof Of Service; Memo Of P&A Filed In Support; Declaration Of Paul Edmond Stephan Filed In Support
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Capabianco, appeared for Defendant/Moving party
Darryl L. Wagner, appeared for Plaintiff/opposing party

Matter argued. TENTATIVE RULINGS ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATIONS. The Court has read and considered the untimely opposition filed by plaintiff. Defendant Ambassador Private Security's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and production of documents is granted. Within 15 days of notice of this order, plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection to defendant's form interrogatories and request for production of documents. Plaintiff is also ordered to produce the documents identified in the notice of deposition. Failure to respond in a timely fashion was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $516.30 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Modifications: 30 days for compliance with discovery. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2005 Assigned To Arbitration On Sep-19-05; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Oct-31-05 At 10:00 A.M.
